ham.subject: Transaction Alert: $5,000.00 Debit on 2026-04-15
ham.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

We are notifying you that a debit of $5,000.00 was processed on your account ending in 1234 on 2026-04-15. If you do not recognize this transaction, please contact us immediately at 1-800-123-4567.

Thank you,
Your Bank
Customer Service

spam.subject: Urgent: Confirm Your Zoom/Teams Meeting Details for Tomorrow
spam.body:
Hello Team,

Our IT security team has scheduled a mandatory Zoom/Teams session for all staff to discuss the upcoming product launch. Please confirm your availability by clicking the link below:

<URL>

Failure to attend may result in a compliance warning. If you have any questions, reply to this email.

Best regards,
IT Operations
